claim: The minor G allele of FOXO3 is related to less severe symptoms of Crohn's Disease.
evidence_sentences: We identify a noncoding polymorphism in FOXO3A (rs12212067: T > G) at which the minor (G) allele, despite not being associated with disease susceptibility, is associated with a milder course of Crohn's disease and rheumatoid arthritis and with increased risk of severe malaria.
